source_jobs.title: Software Engineer, Products
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT CHAI DISCOVERY

Chai is a research lab working on AI to unlock biology. Our models design new molecules for new medicines. We are changing how biologists develop drugs, just as language models are changing how engineers write code. Our vision is a design suite for molecules, with applications across life sciences, agriculture, materials and beyond.

Our founders have been at the forefront of this field from the beginning. We are backed by Thrive, General Catalyst, OpenAI, Dimension and other tier-one investors. We partner with global life sciences companies like Eli Lilly on deals that are transforming industry.

We are known for talent density, rigorous research and pace of execution.

About the role

You'll build Chai's software factory for medicine: the applied AI layer and product that turn our foundation models into tools the world's best drug designers use every day. A great model needs the right product around it to be useful, and right now the products we ship provide just as much leverage as the models do. You'll turn raw model capability into something a biologist reaches for instinctively, and carry what they learn back to the models.

Nobody has fully defined what it means to design a medicine on a computer, so this whole category of software is yours to invent.

Our models have moved beyond structure prediction into real therapeutic engineering, and the product has only begun to catch up. Problems include rendering large molecular structures interactively without dropping frames, designing interfaces that let scientists reason alongside the models, and turning messy scientific workflows into something fast, elegant, and repeatable.

You'll work in a tight loop with researchers, scientists, our partner-facing team, and customers.

About you

We index on taste, agency, and ownership. We're looking for engineers who get obsessed with hard problems, ship small and often, and are as comfortable adapting a model to a real task as they are sweating the details of an interaction. We look for:

 - 2+ years building and owning production products end to end with modern frameworks (React or Vue, TypeScript, and a Node/Go/Python backend)

 - A bias for the smallest amount of code that solves the user's problem well, and real care about pixel-level craft

 - Fluency with automated testing, CI/CD, and monitoring for 24/7 services

 - The instinct to instrument, read data, and iterate on it

 - The ability to explain technical tradeoffs to non-engineers, understand what customers need, and translate scientific requirements into engineering work

A background in biology is not required. What makes the difference is technical excellence, curiosity about the domain, and grit. Prior exposure to enterprise or scientific software is a bonus.


WE OFFER

The opportunity to work at the leading edge of AI research, with world-class people, on a mission that matters. We protect & promote a culture of high velocity and ownership. We offer highly competitive compensation.

source_jobs.title: Research Scientist
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT CHAI DISCOVERY

Chai is a research lab working on AI to unlock biology. Our models design new molecules for new medicines. We are changing how biologists develop drugs, just as language models are changing how engineers write code. Our vision is a design suite for molecules, with applications across life sciences, agriculture, materials and beyond.

Our founders have been at the forefront of this field from the beginning. We are backed by Thrive, General Catalyst, OpenAI, Dimension and other tier-one investors. We partner with global life sciences companies like Eli Lilly on deals that are transforming industry.

We are known for talent density, rigorous research and pace of execution.


ABOUT THE ROLE

We are hiring research scientists with outlier insight who can drive new avenues for the work we pursue. From pre-training large diffusion models and architecture design, to post-training and inference time scaling, we draw upon the best ideas from within our domain and across the field.

Our models have moved beyond protein structure prediction into real-world therapeutic engineering—and we have only just begun. Our team hails from physics, math, theoretical computer science, computational biology and related disciplines. Everyone is capable and self-sufficient, and everyone helps foster a highly collaborative and collegial environment.

Our view is that executing on a long-term research program requires bringing together the right people, with access to the best resources, aligned towards common objectives. And nothing is more essential to our mission and our business than the progress of our research.


ABOUT YOU

We are looking for researchers driven by impact and foundational progress. We index on sustained focus, rigor and results—people who get obsessed with hard problems and don't give up easily. Folks with a nose for tackling the right questions at the right time, alongside an ample dose of grit and curiosity.

We value academic training, research track record, and proven industry accomplishments; we are also more than willing to make a bet on rising talent. We look for engineering capability as well as literature fluency.


WE OFFER

The opportunity to work at the leading edge of AI research, with world-class people, on a mission that matters. We protect & promote a culture of high velocity and ownership. We offer highly competitive compensation.

source_jobs.title: Antibody Engineering
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT CHAI DISCOVERY

Chai is a research lab working on AI to unlock biology. Our models design new molecules for new medicines. We are changing how biologists develop drugs, just as language models are changing how engineers write code. Our vision is a design suite for molecules, with applications across life sciences, agriculture, materials and beyond.

Our founders have been at the forefront of this field from the beginning. We are backed by Thrive, General Catalyst, OpenAI, Dimension and other tier-one investors. We partner with global life sciences companies like Eli Lilly on deals that are transforming industry.

We are known for talent density, rigorous research and pace of execution.


ABOUT THE ROLE

We are looking for exceptional antibody engineers and computational protein designers to help us evaluate, expand and apply the capabilities of our de novo antibody design models. You'll join an elite team of biologists, computational scientists and AI researchers.

Scientists at Chai are power users and test pilots of our AI platform. We probe the design space for novel targets and formats, validate in silico solutions for function in the lab, and distill empirical rules from the results. We execute experimental programs at scale that guide, train and evaluate next generation models, working closely with our AI research team. We partner with scientists from the world's leading pharma companies to push their discovery programs into new territory. I think you could be a good fit.

This is an opportunity to push the boundaries of applied biology and artificial intelligence. You'll get exposed to a wide array of scientific problems and research methods, far beyond what one encounters working on a single drug program or within a traditional life sciences company.


ABOUT YOU

You have a deep desire to push the limits of what’s possible in therapeutic design, and a restless drive to solve real-world problems and iterate quickly. You are curious, high-agency and incredibly persistent.

 - PhD or equivalent experience in the field—Antibody Engineering, Computational Biology, Protein Sciences.

 - Hands-on experience with design and characterization of antibody-based biologics. Proficient in molecular-biology workflows, binding and developability assays, inspecting structures in PyMOL or similar tools.

 - Track record of strong communication, collaboration and execution.


WE OFFER

The opportunity to work at the leading edge of AI research, with world-class people, on a mission that matters. We protect & promote a culture of high velocity and ownership. We offer highly competitive compensation.

source_jobs.title: Software Engineer, Platform & Inference
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT CHAI DISCOVERY

Chai is a research lab working on AI to unlock biology. Our models design new molecules for new medicines. We are changing how biologists develop drugs, just as language models are changing how engineers write code. Our vision is a design suite for molecules, with applications across life sciences, agriculture, materials and beyond.

Our founders have been at the forefront of this field from the beginning. We are backed by Thrive, General Catalyst, OpenAI, Dimension and other tier-one investors. We partner with global life sciences companies like Eli Lilly on deals that are transforming industry.

We are known for talent density, rigorous research and pace of execution.

About the role

Platform engineers make Chai's models fast, cheap, and reliable at scale, and enable the outer loop that accelerates research: the infrastructure and software abstractions used to train, eval, and understand models.

You'll own the serving stack that turns our frontier models into a product scientists depend on: latency, throughput, GPU efficiency, batching, and autoscaling across a large multi-cloud GPU fleet. You'll also contribute to the work that enables turning raw models into product-ready pipelines, and the experiment and observability tooling that lets a researcher ship faster.

You've built high-performance services that developers love, moved ML systems into production at scale, and can see around corners before they become outages.

You'll work closely with the researchers who train the models, the product engineers who build on them, and the commercial team deploying them to the world's largest pharma companies.

About you

We index on systems judgment, ownership, and the scars that come from having run production infrastructure before. We're looking for engineers who get obsessed with hard problems and don't give up easily. We look for:

 - 4+ years building production systems, with real depth in performance, distributed systems, or ML serving

 - Experience optimizing model inference: GPU utilization, batching, quantization, caching, or kernel-level work

 - A platform mindset: you like building the tools and abstractions that make other engineers and researchers faster

 - End-to-end ownership of 24/7 systems, including observability, alerting, and incident response

 - Experience across both 0-to-1 buildouts and 1-to-n scale-ups, with an always-evolving playbook you bring wherever you go

 - The instinct to treat cost and efficiency as first-class constraints, not afterthoughts

A background in biology is not required. What makes the difference is technical excellence, curiosity about the domain, and grit.


WE OFFER

The opportunity to work at the leading edge of AI research, with world-class people, on a mission that matters. We protect & promote a culture of high velocity and ownership. We offer highly competitive compensation.

source_jobs.title: Research Engineer
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT CHAI DISCOVERY

Chai is a research lab working on AI to unlock biology. Our models design new molecules for new medicines. We are changing how biologists develop drugs, just as language models are changing how engineers write code. Our vision is a design suite for molecules, with applications across life sciences, agriculture, materials and beyond.

Our founders have been at the forefront of this field from the beginning. We are backed by Thrive, General Catalyst, OpenAI, Dimension and other tier-one investors. We partner with global life sciences companies like Eli Lilly on deals that are transforming industry.

We are known for talent density, rigorous research and pace of execution.


ABOUT THE ROLE

We are seeking an AI Research Engineer to help design, train, evaluate, and optimize Chai’s core models and infrastructure, working in tight loops with research scientists. Chai's models are moving beyond protein structure prediction into real-world therapeutic engineering. This is a chance to push the frontier of AI drug design, working alongside a craft-obsessed team of micro-pessimists and macro-optimists.

 - Develop and optimize all the infrastructure & tooling upon which our AI research depends.

 - Collaborate with AI researchers to understand, implement and optimize new research directions.

 - Integrate AI models into production systems, ensuring scalability and reliability.


ABOUT YOU

Ideal backgrounds include high-performance computing, custom CUDA kernels and GPU programming, AI/ML + data systems at scale.

 - Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, or a related field.

 - Strong proficiency in programming languages such as Python and deep learning frameworks like PyTorch.

 - Deep understanding of operating system internals.

 - Experience with HPC infrastructure such as Slurm and Kubernetes.

 - Experience with performance engineering and profiling for CPU and CPU workloads.

 - Experience writing, building, and maintaining large-scale ETL pipelines.


WE OFFER

The opportunity to work at the leading edge of AI research, with world-class people, on a mission that matters. We protect & promote a culture of high velocity and ownership. We offer highly competitive compensation.

We index on outlier performance and relentless execution. You sweat the small stuff, you think big, you always take ownership, and you strive for win-win outcomes. We can count on you.

source_jobs.description:
ABOUT CHAI DISCOVERY

Chai is a research lab working on AI to unlock biology. Our models design new molecules for new medicines. We are changing how biologists develop drugs, just as language models are changing how engineers write code. Our vision is a design suite for molecules, with applications across life sciences, agriculture, materials and beyond.

Our founders have been at the forefront of this field from the beginning. We are backed by Thrive, General Catalyst, OpenAI, Dimension and other tier-one investors. We partner with global life sciences companies like Eli Lilly on deals that are transforming industry.

We are known for talent density, rigorous research and pace of execution.


ABOUT THIS ROLE

We are building out our founding partnerships team and looking to make a few key hires to anchor the effort.

Nothing is more important to our business than the success and growth of our partnerships, and that kind of responsibility is exactly what the right person will be eager to assume. You will do whatever it takes to ensure our partnerships are healthy and that Chai exceeds expectations.

You'll team up with phenomenal scientists to push forward multiple concurrent programs, accelerating time to clinic at an unprecedented rate. And you will emerge as a trusted thought partner, helping your counterparts fundamentally rethink their operating model in an era of AI.

You'll also be synthesizing what you learn into actionable intelligence for the rest of the company, helping us shape our product and our future. It will be a lot of fun, a lot of work, and extraordinarily rewarding.


ABOUT YOU

We index on outlier resourcefulness, integrity and execution. You sweat the small stuff, you value relationships, you hold timelines, and you keep everyone on the same page—without ever dropping balls. We can count on you, and so can our partners.

We value scientific and biopharma experience, and we are also more than willing to make a bet on exceptional people with translatable skills. Low-ego, high-EQ, motivated and mission-driven is what we're looking for.


WE OFFER

The opportunity to work at the leading edge of AI research, with world-class people, on a mission that matters. We protect & promote a culture of high velocity and ownership. We offer highly competitive compensation.

source_jobs.title: Design Engineer
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT CHAI DISCOVERY

Chai is a research lab working on AI to unlock biology. Our models design new molecules for new medicines. We are changing how biologists develop drugs, just as language models are changing how engineers write code. Our vision is a design suite for molecules, with applications across life sciences, agriculture, materials and beyond.

Our founders have been at the forefront of this field from the beginning. We are backed by Thrive, General Catalyst, OpenAI, Dimension and other tier-one investors. We partner with global life sciences companies like Eli Lilly on deals that are transforming industry.

We are known for talent density, rigorous research and pace of execution.

About the role

As Chai's first design engineer, you'll define how scientists interact with the most advanced drug design models in the world, and then build it. This is a design-and-build role: you own the interaction paradigm end to end, from research and low-fi sketches through polished, shipped interfaces in real code.

Nobody has fully defined what it means to design a medicine on a computer, so this category of software is yours to invent.

Molecular biology is a cluttered, dense, deeply technical domain, and your job is to make it feel obvious and intuitive. Molecular structures are some of the most striking visuals in science, and the product should live up to them: visual and aesthetic craft matters. A great model needs the right product around it to be useful, and right now the product provides just as much leverage as the models do - the design surface is wide open.

About you

We index on taste, range, and the rare ability to both design and ship. We're looking for someone who gets obsessed with hard problems and sweats the details. We look for:

 - 5+ years designing exceptional products, with a portfolio showing end-to-end ownership of complex tools built for domain experts

 - The ability to build what you design: comfortable moving from sketch to Figma to interactive prototype to production front-end code, and fluent talking code with engineers

 - Experience designing AI-first products that break the mold and do new things in new ways

 - A bias for simplicity and minimalism in highly technical domains

 - A clear communicator who can articulate design decisions and synthesize complex science for cross-functional audiences, and a sharp listener who pulls the best ideas and the smallest details into the work

You're excited to dive into molecular biology, drug discovery, and AI/ML. A background in biology is not required - what makes the difference is craft, curiosity, and grit. Data visualization, data science, or scientific domain experience is a bonus.


WE OFFER

The opportunity to work at the leading edge of AI research, with world-class people, on a mission that matters. We protect & promote a culture of high velocity and ownership. We offer highly competitive compensation.

source_jobs.title: Security Engineer
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT CHAI DISCOVERY

Chai is a research lab working on AI to unlock biology. Our models design new molecules for new medicines. We are changing how biologists develop drugs, just as language models are changing how engineers write code. Our vision is a design suite for molecules, with applications across life sciences, agriculture, materials and beyond.

Our founders have been at the forefront of this field from the beginning. We are backed by Thrive, General Catalyst, OpenAI, Dimension and other tier-one investors. We partner with global life sciences companies like Eli Lilly on deals that are transforming industry.

We are known for talent density, rigorous research and pace of execution.

About the role

Security is what earns Chai the trust of the world's largest pharma companies. It's a precondition for the business, not a cost center. We're looking for someone to help own and build the security function end to end.

You'll represent Chai's security posture to our partners directly, sitting across from their CISOs and cloud security architects on reviews of our compute architecture, tenant isolation, egress controls, encryption, and key management. You'll drive the changes they surface back into the product and infrastructure and help Chai keep ahead of new risks.

Just as importantly, you'll be the trusted security partner to our Applied AI and Platform engineers, reviewing architecture like our shared inference fleets and per-partner data isolation before they're built, shipping the security controls that are tricky for non-specialists to get right, and automating the compliance, onboarding, and vendor work so the program mostly runs itself.

Our models have moved beyond structure prediction into real therapeutic engineering, and the partnerships that come with that raise the bar every quarter.

About you

We index on judgment, breadth, and the instinct to build security in rather than bolt it on. The archetype is an engineer who specialized into security, thinks about the business as much as the threat model, and would rather partner with engineers than audit them. We look for:

 - 5+ years in security engineering, having built or meaningfully improved a security program at a high-growth company (you have intuition for what a 30-person startup needs versus a 1,000-person one)

 - The ability to write targeted production code (Python, TypeScript), not just scripts

 - Startup or high-growth experience, working close to engineering rather than at arm's length

 - The credibility and presence to represent Chai on customer security calls with pharma CISOs

 - Comfort owning detection, response, and incident management end to end

 - Familiarity with SOC 2 and ISO 27001 as programs to run well, not boxes to check

Life sciences or other regulated-industry experience is a bonus. A background in biology is not required. What makes the difference is technical excellence, business sense, and grit.


WE OFFER

The opportunity to work at the leading edge of AI research, with world-class people, on a mission that matters. We protect & promote a culture of high velocity and ownership. We offer highly competitive compensation.

source_jobs.title: Forward-Deployed Scientist
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT CHAI DISCOVERY

Chai is a research lab working on AI to unlock biology. Our models design new molecules for new medicines. We are changing how biologists develop drugs, just as language models are changing how engineers write code. Our vision is a design suite for molecules, with applications across life sciences, agriculture, materials and beyond.

Our founders have been at the forefront of this field from the beginning. We are backed by Thrive, General Catalyst, OpenAI, Dimension and other tier-one investors. We partner with global life sciences companies like Eli Lilly on deals that are transforming industry.

We are known for talent density, rigorous research and pace of execution.


ABOUT THE ROLE

We are building out our founding forward-deployed team and looking to make a few key hires to anchor the effort. This position operates at the frontier of drug discovery and the frontier of AI research. Your mandate is to ensure that we understand everything our industry partners are trying to accomplish, and that they utilize our platform to maximum effect.

You will become an expert in our partners' scientific and therapeutic problems, and you will operate as a power user who knows all the ins and outs of our technology. You will apply your intellect, intuition and creativity to solve novel biological problems and drug targets, working with top scientists across industry and our own research team.

You'll peek into myriad drug programs, getting exposure well beyond any one drug program. You will be our eyes & ears on the ground, taking your findings back inside the building to refine our product, our models, and our approach. You will be an advisor to some of the most important drug programs of our time.

It will be a lot of fun, a lot of work, and extraordinarily rewarding.


ABOUT YOU

We index on ravenous curiosity, outlier aptitude and collaboration smarts. You operate with urgency, have well-honed communication skills, and probably can't sleep if something isn't right.

We value academic research and drug discovery industry experience in antibody engineering, protein science, and computational design. We are also more than willing to bet on rising stars. Low-ego, high-EQ, thrive under pressure and a track record of great execution is what we're looking for.


WE OFFER

The opportunity to work at the leading edge of AI research, with world-class people, on a mission that matters. We protect & promote a culture of high velocity and ownership. We offer highly competitive compensation.

source_jobs.title: Talent
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT CHAI DISCOVERY

Chai is a research lab working on AI to unlock biology. Our models design new molecules for new medicines. We are changing how biologists develop drugs, just as language models are changing how engineers write code. Our vision is a design suite for molecules, with applications across life sciences, agriculture, materials and beyond.

Our founders have been at the forefront of this field from the beginning. We are backed by Thrive, General Catalyst, OpenAI, Dimension and other tier-one investors. We partner with global life sciences companies like Eli Lilly on deals that are transforming industry.

We are known for talent density, rigorous research and pace of execution.


CAN YOU HELP US?

We are looking for a few exceptional individuals to anchor our founding talent team. We are indexing on curiosity, taste, resourcefulness, IQ and EQ in equal measure. It will be a lot of fun, a lot of work, and extraordinarily rewarding.

#1 Build an incredible company.

You will help design every detail of this org. You will refine your nose for outlier talent and exceptional genius, wherever it may be found. You will relentlessly tackle every aspect of every assignment you take on. You'll work with our founders and leaders day in and out.

#2 Learn everything, communicate expertly.

This job demands that you can hold an intelligent conversation with anyone at any level. You will ravenously learn everything about what we're doing, why we're doing it, and where we're headed -- so that you can tell our story with passion and authenticity. You care and build trust by keeping it real.

#3 Think + act different.

We don't think the status quo is good enough, and neither do you. You have consistently shown innate ability to think and act beyond what is expected in order to achieve out-of-distribution results. You turn insight into action, optimize for iteration over perfection, and operate with urgency & creativity in equal measure.


WHERE COULD THIS LEAD?

You will walk away from this position knowing that you were a force multiplier in accelerating humanity's progress towards better medicines and better understanding of biology. You will gain the know-how and the network to establish yourself as an industry operator, bolstering any plans you might have to found your own company one day.


WE OFFER

The opportunity to work at the leading edge of AI research, with world-class people, on a mission that matters. We protect & promote a culture of high velocity and ownership. We offer highly competitive compensation.

source_jobs.title: Data Generation
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT CHAI DISCOVERY

Chai is a research lab working on AI to unlock biology. Our models design new molecules for new medicines. We are changing how biologists develop drugs, just as language models are changing how engineers write code. Our vision is a design suite for molecules, with applications across life sciences, agriculture, materials and beyond.

Our founders have been at the forefront of this field from the beginning. We are backed by Thrive, General Catalyst, OpenAI, Dimension and other tier-one investors. We partner with global life sciences companies like Eli Lilly on deals that are transforming industry.

We are known for talent density, rigorous research and pace of execution.


ABOUT THE ROLE

We are looking for a data operations expert, or a fast-rising generalist, to help drive data generation initiatives here at Chai. Someone who operates with urgency, has strong communication and project management skills, and who has an analytical nature.

Data is vital to training frontier AI models, testing research hypotheses, and supporting our partners. You will set the vision and execute scaling of Chai’s lab-in-the-loop data platform, working hand-in-hand with our science and research teams. You don't need a biology background, but you will need to pick it up while learning about our AI methods.

This is a chance to push the boundaries of drug discovery and contribute to some of most advanced AI models ever imagined. Immerse yourself in technologies that represent the future of biotech, and position yourself at the forefront of this emerging field.


ABOUT YOU

Our ideal candidate can:

 - Design & drive complex projects and workflows, across multi-party relationships.

 - Translate research goals into concrete deliverables—experiments, deliverables, success criteria, SOWs, timelines, trackers, etc.

 - Communicate highly technical information with clarity.

 - Juggle concurrent projects and priorities, adapting quickly and keeping everyone in sync.

 - Develop a vision for how we scale our data program by orders of magnitude.

You have a deep desire to push the limits of what’s possible and restless drive to solve real-world problems by iterating fast. Exposure to startups or other intense environments is important.

 - Organized and scrappy

 - Detail-oriented and fast-moving

 - Flexible, proactive, ambitious


WE OFFER

The opportunity to work at the leading edge of AI research, with world-class people, on a mission that matters. We protect & promote a culture of high velocity and ownership. We offer highly competitive compensation.

notes: Highly technical roles, AI research lab, backed by top investors
